case_title: GOYAL, AMRISH VS TADESSE, MR. SAM, PACIFIC PARK MANAGEMENT INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-01-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-29-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 6/29/06 AT 3:30 P.M. BY ORDER OF THE COURT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,815.00 FILED BY GOYAL, AMRISH AS TO DEFENDANT TADESSE, MR. SAM, PACIFIC PARK MANAGEMENT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO MR. SAM TADESSE, PACIFIC MANAGEMENT INC.
NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES AFTER 6/29/06 AT 3:30 P.M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOYAL, AMRISH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TADESSE, MR. SAM, PACIFIC PARK MANAGEMENT INC. $3,048.86 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,158.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOYAL, AMRISH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TADESSE, MR. SAM, PACIFIC PARK MANAGEMENT INC. $2,698.80 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,808.80, JUDGMENT AGAINST SAM TADESSE DATED JUN 29, 06 IS VACATED. NO EVIDENCE WAS INTRODUCED THAT MR TADESSE HAD ANY PERSONAL LIABILITY FOR THE DAMAGES ALL EVIDENCE WAS RETURNED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT TADESSE, MR. SAM, PACIFIC PARK MANAGEMENT INC.
